boundaries.name: Core / Integration Separation
boundaries.rule: Core domain packages (core/, risk/, intelligence/, options/) must not import from integration/, data/, execution/, or any external package directly. Dependencies flow INWARD through interfaces defined in core/.

boundaries.name: OpenAlgo Isolation
boundaries.rule: No code outside integration/ may import from the OpenAlgo package. All interactions with OpenAlgo pass through the OpenAlgoAdapter defined in integration/.

boundaries.name: DhanHQ Isolation
boundaries.rule: No code outside integration/ may import from dhanhq. All Dhan-specific operations pass through the DhanAdapter in integration/.

boundaries.name: Plugin Isolation
boundaries.rule: Plugins are loaded dynamically and communicate via defined interfaces in plugins/. A plugin must never import from another plugin directly.

boundaries.name: Config Isolation
boundaries.rule: Secrets and credentials must never be hardcoded. All config is loaded from environment variables or config files under configs/. No config files are committed to the repo without .local suffix.
